description: Complete multi-dialect DAX-to-SQL translation for unified financial services super-bundle across all domains

metrics.description: Convert transaction amount from source to reporting currency using spot FX rate on transaction date.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT amount_source_currency * spot_fx_rate AS spot_conversion FROM fx_trades
metrics.oracle: SELECT amount_source_currency * spot_fx_rate AS spot_conversion FROM fx_trades
metrics.postgres: SELECT amount_source_currency * spot_fx_rate AS spot_conversion FROM fx_trades
metrics.snowflake: SELECT amount_source_currency * spot_fx_rate AS spot_conversion FROM fx_trades
metrics.iceberg: SELECT amount_source_currency * spot_fx_rate AS spot_conversion FROM fx_trades

metrics.description: Average FX rate over reporting period for P&L translation.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT AVG(fx_rate) AS average_period_rate FROM fx_rates WHERE rate_date BETWEEN @period_start AND @period_end
metrics.oracle: SELECT AVG(fx_rate) AS average_period_rate FROM fx_rates WHERE rate_date BETWEEN :period_start AND :period_end
metrics.postgres: SELECT AVG(fx_rate) AS average_period_rate FROM fx_rates WHERE rate_date BETWEEN $1 AND $2
metrics.snowflake: SELECT AVG(fx_rate) AS average_period_rate FROM fx_rates WHERE rate_date BETWEEN :period_start AND :period_end
metrics.iceberg: SELECT AVG(fx_rate) AS average_period_rate FROM fx_rates WHERE rate_date BETWEEN DATE(:period_start) AND DATE(:period_end)

metrics.description: Translate monetary assets/liabilities at period-end closing rate.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT balance_foreign_currency * fx_rate_closing AS closing_rate_translation FROM balances
metrics.oracle: SELECT balance_foreign_currency * fx_rate_closing AS closing_rate_translation FROM balances
metrics.postgres: SELECT balance_foreign_currency * fx_rate_closing AS closing_rate_translation FROM balances
metrics.snowflake: SELECT balance_foreign_currency * fx_rate_closing AS closing_rate_translation FROM balances
metrics.iceberg: SELECT balance_foreign_currency * fx_rate_closing AS closing_rate_translation FROM balances

metrics.description: FX assets minus FX liabilities per currency.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT fx_assets - fx_liabilities AS net_fx_exposure FROM fx_positions
metrics.oracle: SELECT fx_assets - fx_liabilities AS net_fx_exposure FROM fx_positions
metrics.postgres: SELECT fx_assets - fx_liabilities AS net_fx_exposure FROM fx_positions
metrics.snowflake: SELECT fx_assets - fx_liabilities AS net_fx_exposure FROM fx_positions
metrics.iceberg: SELECT fx_assets - fx_liabilities AS net_fx_exposure FROM fx_positions

metrics.description: Unhedged FX exposure after derivatives.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT (fx_assets - fx_liabilities) - hedged_amount AS open_fx_position FROM fx_positions
metrics.oracle: SELECT (fx_assets - fx_liabilities) - hedged_amount AS open_fx_position FROM fx_positions
metrics.postgres: SELECT (fx_assets - fx_liabilities) - hedged_amount AS open_fx_position FROM fx_positions
metrics.snowflake: SELECT (fx_assets - fx_liabilities) - hedged_amount AS open_fx_position FROM fx_positions
metrics.iceberg: SELECT (fx_assets - fx_liabilities) - hedged_amount AS open_fx_position FROM fx_positions

metrics.description: FX gain/loss from remeasurement of open positions.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT (current_fx_rate - prior_fx_rate) * open_position_foreign AS unrealised_fx_gain_loss FROM fx_positions
metrics.oracle: SELECT (current_fx_rate - prior_fx_rate) * open_position_foreign AS unrealised_fx_gain_loss FROM fx_positions
metrics.postgres: SELECT (current_fx_rate - prior_fx_rate) * open_position_foreign AS unrealised_fx_gain_loss FROM fx_positions
metrics.snowflake: SELECT (current_fx_rate - prior_fx_rate) * open_position_foreign AS unrealised_fx_gain_loss FROM fx_positions
metrics.iceberg: SELECT (current_fx_rate - prior_fx_rate) * open_position_foreign AS unrealised_fx_gain_loss FROM fx_positions

metrics.description: Portion of total portfolio return attributable to currency movements.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT portfolio_return_base - portfolio_return_local AS currency_contribution_to_return FROM portfolio_returns
metrics.oracle: SELECT portfolio_return_base - portfolio_return_local AS currency_contribution_to_return FROM portfolio_returns
metrics.postgres: SELECT portfolio_return_base - portfolio_return_local AS currency_contribution_to_return FROM portfolio_returns
metrics.snowflake: SELECT portfolio_return_base - portfolio_return_local AS currency_contribution_to_return FROM portfolio_returns
metrics.iceberg: SELECT portfolio_return_base - portfolio_return_local AS currency_contribution_to_return FROM portfolio_returns

metrics.description: Parametric 1-day FX VaR scaled and reported as 30-day rolling (placeholder form).
metrics.dax_formula: Not recommended in DAX for DirectQuery; precompute in SQL.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ret_1d) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_pair ORDER BY rate_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * exposure_base AS rolling_30d_fx_var FROM fx_returns
metrics.oracle: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ret_1d) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_pair ORDER BY rate_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * exposure_base AS rolling_30d_fx_var FROM fx_returns
metrics.postgres: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ret_1d) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_pair ORDER BY rate_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * exposure_base AS rolling_30d_fx_var FROM fx_returns
metrics.snowflake: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ret_1d) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_pair ORDER BY rate_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * exposure_base AS rolling_30d_fx_var FROM fx_returns
metrics.iceberg: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ret_1d) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_pair ORDER BY rate_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * exposure_base AS rolling_30d_fx_var FROM fx_returns

metrics.description: Interest income using the effective interest rate (EIR) method for amortised cost instruments.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT opening_carrying_amount * effective_interest_rate AS effective_interest_income FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.oracle: SELECT opening_carrying_amount * effective_interest_rate AS effective_interest_income FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.postgres: SELECT opening_carrying_amount * effective_interest_rate AS effective_interest_income FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.snowflake: SELECT opening_carrying_amount * effective_interest_rate AS effective_interest_income FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.iceberg: SELECT opening_carrying_amount * effective_interest_rate AS effective_interest_income FROM ia_cashflows

metrics.description: Effective interest amortization of premium (negative) or accretion of discount (positive).
metrics.sql_server: SELECT effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received AS premium_discount_amortization FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.oracle: SELECT effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received AS premium_discount_amortization FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.postgres: SELECT effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received AS premium_discount_amortization FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.snowflake: SELECT effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received AS premium_discount_amortization FROM ia_cashflows
metrics.iceberg: SELECT effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received AS premium_discount_amortization FROM ia_cashflows

metrics.description: Amortised cost carrying amount rollforward: opening + EIR income − coupons ± amortization − credit_loss ± fx.
metrics.neutral_formula: opening + eir - coupons + amort - credit_loss + fx
metrics.sql_server: SELECT opening_carrying_amount + effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received + premium_discount_amortization - credit_loss_allowance_change + fx_remeasurement AS carrying_amount_rollforward FROM ia_balances
metrics.oracle: SELECT opening_carrying_amount + effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received + premium_discount_amortization - credit_loss_allowance_change + fx_remeasurement AS carrying_amount_rollforward FROM ia_balances
metrics.postgres: SELECT opening_carrying_amount + effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received + premium_discount_amortization - credit_loss_allowance_change + fx_remeasurement AS carrying_amount_rollforward FROM ia_balances
metrics.snowflake: SELECT opening_carrying_amount + effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received + premium_discount_amortization - credit_loss_allowance_change + fx_remeasurement AS carrying_amount_rollforward FROM ia_balances
metrics.iceberg: SELECT opening_carrying_amount + effective_interest_income - coupon_cash_received + premium_discount_amortization - credit_loss_allowance_change + fx_remeasurement AS carrying_amount_rollforward FROM ia_balances

metrics.description: Unrealised fair value gain/loss for trading (FVTPL) recognised in P&L.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT fair_value_current - fair_value_prior AS fair_value_change_pnl_trading FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.oracle: SELECT fair_value_current - fair_value_prior AS fair_value_change_pnl_trading FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.postgres: SELECT fair_value_current - fair_value_prior AS fair_value_change_pnl_trading FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.snowflake: SELECT fair_value_current - fair_value_prior AS fair_value_change_pnl_trading FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.iceberg: SELECT fair_value_current - fair_value_prior AS fair_value_change_pnl_trading FROM ia_fair_values

metrics.description: Unrealised fair value gain/loss for FVOCI recognised in OCI until realised.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT fair_value_current - amortised_cost_current AS fair_value_change_oci_afs FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.oracle: SELECT fair_value_current - amortised_cost_current AS fair_value_change_oci_afs FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.postgres: SELECT fair_value_current - amortised_cost_current AS fair_value_change_oci_afs FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.snowflake: SELECT fair_value_current - amortised_cost_current AS fair_value_change_oci_afs FROM ia_fair_values
metrics.iceberg: SELECT fair_value_current - amortised_cost_current AS fair_value_change_oci_afs FROM ia_fair_values

metrics.description: Realised gain/loss on disposal = consideration − carrying amount at sale.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT consideration_received - carrying_amount_at_sale AS realised_gain_loss_disposal FROM ia_events
metrics.oracle: SELECT consideration_received - carrying_amount_at_sale AS realised_gain_loss_disposal FROM ia_events
metrics.postgres: SELECT consideration_received - carrying_amount_at_sale AS realised_gain_loss_disposal FROM ia_events
metrics.snowflake: SELECT consideration_received - carrying_amount_at_sale AS realised_gain_loss_disposal FROM ia_events
metrics.iceberg: SELECT consideration_received - carrying_amount_at_sale AS realised_gain_loss_disposal FROM ia_events

metrics.description: Period movement in expected credit loss (ECL) allowance recognised in P&L.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT ecl_closing - ecl_opening AS credit_loss_allowance_change FROM ia_impairment
metrics.oracle: SELECT ecl_closing - ecl_opening AS credit_loss_allowance_change FROM ia_impairment
metrics.postgres: SELECT ecl_closing - ecl_opening AS credit_loss_allowance_change FROM ia_impairment
metrics.snowflake: SELECT ecl_closing - ecl_opening AS credit_loss_allowance_change FROM ia_impairment
metrics.iceberg: SELECT ecl_closing - ecl_opening AS credit_loss_allowance_change FROM ia_impairment

metrics.description: Cumulative translation adjustment (CTA) for foreign operations recognised in OCI.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT COALESCE(cta_prior, 0) + cta_movement AS fx_translation_reserve_oci FROM ia_fx
metrics.oracle: SELECT NVL(cta_prior, 0) + cta_movement AS fx_translation_reserve_oci FROM ia_fx
metrics.postgres: SELECT COALESCE(cta_prior, 0) + cta_movement AS fx_translation_reserve_oci FROM ia_fx
metrics.snowflake: SELECT COALESCE(cta_prior, 0) + cta_movement AS fx_translation_reserve_oci FROM ia_fx
metrics.iceberg: SELECT COALESCE(cta_prior, 0) + cta_movement AS fx_translation_reserve_oci FROM ia_fx

metrics.description: Internal rate of return of all future cash flows until maturity.
metrics.neutral_formula: YIELD(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
metrics.dax_formula: YIELD(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis) AS yield_to_maturity FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis) AS yield_to_maturity FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT yield_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis) AS yield_to_maturity FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis) AS yield_to_maturity FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT yield_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis) AS yield_to_maturity FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Price sensitivity to yield changes, adjusted for compounding.
metrics.neutral_formula: DURATION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency)
metrics.dax_formula: DURATION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency)
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.DURATION_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency) AS modified_duration FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT DURATION_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency) AS modified_duration FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT duration_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency) AS modified_duration FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT DURATION_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency) AS modified_duration FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT duration_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) / (1 + ytm / frequency) AS modified_duration FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Second derivative of price with respect to yield, measuring curvature.
metrics.neutral_formula: CONVEXITY(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis)
metrics.dax_formula: CONVEXITY(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis)
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.CONVEXITY_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) AS convexity FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT CONVEXITY_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) AS convexity FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT convexity_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) AS convexity FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT CONVEXITY_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) AS convexity FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT convexity_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, ytm, frequency, basis) AS convexity FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Spread over risk-free rate that accounts for embedded options.
metrics.dax_formula: Not directly in DAX; precompute in SQL.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.OAS_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, volatility) AS option_adjusted_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT OAS_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, volatility) AS option_adjusted_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT oas_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, volatility) AS option_adjusted_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT OAS_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, volatility) AS option_adjusted_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT oas_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, volatility) AS option_adjusted_spread FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Difference between corporate bond yield and comparable government bond yield.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT corporate_ytm - government_ytm AS credit_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT corporate_ytm - government_ytm AS credit_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT corporate_ytm - government_ytm AS credit_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT corporate_ytm - government_ytm AS credit_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT corporate_ytm - government_ytm AS credit_spread FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Zero-volatility spread over the spot curve.
metrics.neutral_formula: Z_SPREAD(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve)
metrics.dax_formula: Not directly in DAX; precompute in SQL.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.Z_SPREAD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve) AS z_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.oracle: SELECT Z_SPREAD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve) AS z_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.postgres: SELECT z_spread_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve) AS z_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.snowflake: SELECT Z_SPREAD_FUNCTION(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve) AS z_spread FROM fixed_income
metrics.iceberg: SELECT z_spread_function(settlement_date, maturity_date, coupon_rate, price, redemption, frequency, basis, spot_curve) AS z_spread FROM fixed_income

metrics.description: Maximum expected loss over a period at a given confidence level.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(confidence_level) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY loss_amount) AS value_at_risk FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(confidence_level) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY loss_amount) AS value_at_risk FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(confidence_level) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY loss_amount) AS value_at_risk FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(confidence_level) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY loss_amount) AS value_at_risk FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(confidence_level) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY loss_amount) AS value_at_risk FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: Risk-adjusted return using Sharpe Ratio.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN STDEV(portfolio_returns) <> 0 THEN (AVG(portfolio_returns) - risk_free_rate) / STDEV(portfolio_returns) ELSE NULL END AS sharpe_ratio FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN STDDEV(portfolio_returns) <> 0 THEN (AVG(portfolio_returns) - risk_free_rate) / STDDEV(portfolio_returns) ELSE NULL END AS sharpe_ratio FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN STDDEV(portfolio_returns) <> 0 THEN (AVG(portfolio_returns) - risk_free_rate) / STDDEV(portfolio_returns) ELSE NULL END AS sharpe_ratio FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(STDEV(portfolio_returns) <> 0, (AVG(portfolio_returns) - risk_free_rate) / STDEV(portfolio_returns), NULL) AS sharpe_ratio FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(STDEV(portfolio_returns) != 0, (AVG(portfolio_returns) - risk_free_rate) / STDEV(portfolio_returns), NULL) AS sharpe_ratio FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: Measure of volatility relative to market.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN VAR(market_returns) <> 0 THEN COVAR(portfolio_returns, market_returns) / VAR(market_returns) ELSE NULL END AS beta_coefficient FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN VAR_SAMP(market_returns) <> 0 THEN COVAR_SAMP(portfolio_returns, market_returns) / VAR_SAMP(market_returns) ELSE NULL END AS beta_coefficient FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN VAR_SAMP(market_returns) <> 0 THEN COVAR_SAMP(portfolio_returns, market_returns) / VAR_SAMP(market_returns) ELSE NULL END AS beta_coefficient FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(VAR_SAMP(market_returns) <> 0, COVAR_SAMP(portfolio_returns, market_returns) / VAR_SAMP(market_returns), NULL) AS beta_coefficient FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(VAR_SAMP(market_returns) != 0, COVAR_SAMP(portfolio_returns, market_returns) / VAR_SAMP(market_returns), NULL) AS beta_coefficient FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: Breakdown of P&L into components: price, FX, carry, etc.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT price_pnl + fx_pnl + carry_pnl + other_pnl AS pnl_decomposition FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT price_pnl + fx_pnl + carry_pnl + other_pnl AS pnl_decomposition FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT price_pnl + fx_pnl + carry_pnl + other_pnl AS pnl_decomposition FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT price_pnl + fx_pnl + carry_pnl + other_pnl AS pnl_decomposition FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT price_pnl + fx_pnl + carry_pnl + other_pnl AS pnl_decomposition FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: First derivative of option price with respect to underlying price.
metrics.neutral_formula: DELTA(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type)
metrics.dax_formula: Not directly in DAX; precompute in SQL.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.DELTA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS delta_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT DELTA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS delta_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT delta_function(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS delta_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT DELTA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS delta_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT delta_function(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS delta_greek FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: Second derivative of option price with respect to underlying price.
metrics.neutral_formula: GAMMA(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type)
metrics.dax_formula: Not directly in DAX; precompute in SQL.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.GAMMA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS gamma_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.oracle: SELECT GAMMA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS gamma_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.postgres: SELECT gamma_function(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS gamma_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.snowflake: SELECT GAMMA_FUNCTION(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS gamma_greek FROM capital_markets
metrics.iceberg: SELECT gamma_function(underlying_price, strike, time_to_expiry, volatility, risk_free_rate, dividend_yield, option_type) AS gamma_greek FROM capital_markets

metrics.description: Net interest income as a percentage of average earning assets.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(earning_assets) <> 0 THEN (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets) ELSE NULL END AS net_interest_margin FROM banking
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(earning_assets) <> 0 THEN (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets) ELSE NULL END AS net_interest_margin FROM banking
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(earning_assets) <> 0 THEN (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets) ELSE NULL END AS net_interest_margin FROM banking
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(AVG(earning_assets) <> 0, (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets), NULL) AS net_interest_margin FROM banking
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(AVG(earning_assets) != 0, (SUM(interest_income) - SUM(interest_expense)) / AVG(earning_assets), NULL) AS net_interest_margin FROM banking

metrics.description: Common Equity Tier 1 capital as a percentage of risk-weighted assets.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(risk_weighted_assets) <> 0 THEN SUM(cet1_capital) / SUM(risk_weighted_assets) ELSE NULL END AS cet1_ratio FROM banking
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(risk_weighted_assets) <> 0 THEN SUM(cet1_capital) / SUM(risk_weighted_assets) ELSE NULL END AS cet1_ratio FROM banking
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(risk_weighted_assets) <> 0 THEN SUM(cet1_capital) / SUM(risk_weighted_assets) ELSE NULL END AS cet1_ratio FROM banking
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(risk_weighted_assets) <> 0, SUM(cet1_capital) / SUM(risk_weighted_assets), NULL) AS cet1_ratio FROM banking
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(risk_weighted_assets) != 0, SUM(cet1_capital) / SUM(risk_weighted_assets), NULL) AS cet1_ratio FROM banking

metrics.description: High-quality liquid assets divided by net cash outflows over 30 days.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) <> 0 THEN SUM(hql_assets) / SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) ELSE NULL END AS liquidity_coverage_ratio FROM banking
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) <> 0 THEN SUM(hql_assets) / SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) ELSE NULL END AS liquidity_coverage_ratio FROM banking
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) <> 0 THEN SUM(hql_assets) / SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) ELSE NULL END AS liquidity_coverage_ratio FROM banking
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) <> 0, SUM(hql_assets) / SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d), NULL) AS liquidity_coverage_ratio FROM banking
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d) != 0, SUM(hql_assets) / SUM(net_cash_outflows_30d), NULL) AS liquidity_coverage_ratio FROM banking

metrics.description: Incurred losses divided by earned premiums.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(earned_premiums) <> 0 THEN SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums) ELSE NULL END AS loss_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(earned_premiums) <> 0 THEN SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums) ELSE NULL END AS loss_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(earned_premiums) <> 0 THEN SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums) ELSE NULL END AS loss_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(earned_premiums) <> 0, SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums), NULL) AS loss_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(earned_premiums) != 0, SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums), NULL) AS loss_ratio FROM insurance

metrics.description: Loss ratio plus expense ratio.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT (SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) + (SUM(expenses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) AS combined_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.oracle: SELECT (SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) + (SUM(expenses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) AS combined_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.postgres: SELECT (SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) + (SUM(expenses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) AS combined_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.snowflake: SELECT (SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) + (SUM(expenses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) AS combined_ratio FROM insurance
metrics.iceberg: SELECT (SUM(incurred_losses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) + (SUM(expenses) / SUM(earned_premiums)) AS combined_ratio FROM insurance

metrics.description: Weighted blend of Environmental, Social, and Governance sub-scores.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT (E_score * E_weight) + (S_score * S_weight) + (G_score * G_weight) AS esg_composite_score FROM esg
metrics.oracle: SELECT (E_score * E_weight) + (S_score * S_weight) + (G_score * G_weight) AS esg_composite_score FROM esg
metrics.postgres: SELECT (E_score * E_weight) + (S_score * S_weight) + (G_score * G_weight) AS esg_composite_score FROM esg
metrics.snowflake: SELECT (E_score * E_weight) + (S_score * S_weight) + (G_score * G_weight) AS esg_composite_score FROM esg
metrics.iceberg: SELECT (E_score * E_weight) + (S_score * S_weight) + (G_score * G_weight) AS esg_composite_score FROM esg

metrics.description: Emissions per unit of revenue.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN SUM(emissions) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS carbon_intensity FROM esg
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN SUM(emissions) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS carbon_intensity FROM esg
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN SUM(emissions) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS carbon_intensity FROM esg
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(revenue) <> 0, SUM(emissions) / SUM(revenue), NULL) AS carbon_intensity FROM esg
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(revenue) != 0, SUM(emissions) / SUM(revenue), NULL) AS carbon_intensity FROM esg

metrics.description: Internal rate of return for private equity investments.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT dbo.XIRR_FUNCTION(cashflows, dates) AS irr_private_equity FROM alternatives
metrics.oracle: SELECT XIRR_FUNCTION(cashflows, dates) AS irr_private_equity FROM alternatives
metrics.postgres: SELECT xirr_function(cashflows, dates) AS irr_private_equity FROM alternatives
metrics.snowflake: SELECT XIRR_FUNCTION(cashflows, dates) AS irr_private_equity FROM alternatives
metrics.iceberg: SELECT xirr_function(cashflows, dates) AS irr_private_equity FROM alternatives

metrics.description: Multiple of invested capital.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(invested_capital) <> 0 THEN SUM(distributions) / SUM(invested_capital) ELSE NULL END AS moic FROM alternatives
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(invested_capital) <> 0 THEN SUM(distributions) / SUM(invested_capital) ELSE NULL END AS moic FROM alternatives
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(invested_capital) <> 0 THEN SUM(distributions) / SUM(invested_capital) ELSE NULL END AS moic FROM alternatives
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(invested_capital) <> 0, SUM(distributions) / SUM(invested_capital), NULL) AS moic FROM alternatives
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(invested_capital) != 0, SUM(distributions) / SUM(invested_capital), NULL) AS moic FROM alternatives

metrics.description: Expected credit loss allowance.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT SUM(probability_of_default * exposure_at_default * loss_given_default) AS expected_credit_loss FROM risk
metrics.oracle: SELECT SUM(probability_of_default * exposure_at_default * loss_given_default) AS expected_credit_loss FROM risk
metrics.postgres: SELECT SUM(probability_of_default * exposure_at_default * loss_given_default) AS expected_credit_loss FROM risk
metrics.snowflake: SELECT SUM(probability_of_default * exposure_at_default * loss_given_default) AS expected_credit_loss FROM risk
metrics.iceberg: SELECT SUM(probability_of_default * exposure_at_default * loss_given_default) AS expected_credit_loss FROM risk

metrics.description: Client profitability margin.
metrics.sql_server: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS client_profitability FROM operations
metrics.oracle: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS client_profitability FROM operations
metrics.postgres: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(revenue) <> 0 THEN (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue) ELSE NULL END AS client_profitability FROM operations
metrics.snowflake: SELECT IFF(SUM(revenue) <> 0, (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue), NULL) AS client_profitability FROM operations
metrics.iceberg: SELECT IF(SUM(revenue) != 0, (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) / SUM(revenue), NULL) AS client_profitability FROM operations

function_mapping_appendix.description: Comprehensive DAX-to-SQL function mapping for cross-engine consistency in financial services semantic layer

mappings.sql_server: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END
mappings.oracle: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END
mappings.postgres: CASE WHEN b <> 0 THEN a / b ELSE alt END
mappings.notes: Avoid division by zero; preserve NULLs where appropriate.

mappings.sql_server: CASE WHEN condition THEN true_value ELSE false_value END
mappings.oracle: CASE WHEN condition THEN true_value ELSE false_value END
mappings.postgres: CASE WHEN condition THEN true_value ELSE false_value END
mappings.notes: Snowflake and Iceberg have shorthand IF/IFF.

mappings.sql_server: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.oracle: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.postgres: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.snowflake: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
mappings.iceberg: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)

mappings.notes: Use windowed version for rolling metrics.
Implement as UDF in each engine.

mappings.dax: YIELD(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.neutral: bond_yield(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.sql_server: dbo.YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.oracle: YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.postgres: yield_function(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.snowflake: YIELD_FUNCTION(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.iceberg: yield_function(settlement, maturity, coupon, price, redemption, frequency, basis)
mappings.notes: Implement as UDF in each engine.

mappings.oracle: DURATION_FUNCTION(settlement, maturity, coupon, ytm, frequency, basis)
mappings.postgres: duration_function(settlement, maturity, coupon, ytm, frequency, basis)
mappings.snowflake: DURATION_FUNCTION(settlement, maturity, coupon, ytm, frequency, basis)
mappings.iceberg: duration_function(settlement, maturity, coupon, ytm, frequency, basis)
mappings.notes: Implement as UDF in each engine.
